criticalRules: Supports multiple curves via color list in exprs[0]
CRITICAL: Scope blocks MUST have a CLOCK_c block connected to their ControlPort (red top port) via a CommandControlLink, otherwise graph is empty.

CRITICAL: exprs[0] (curve_colors) MUST ALWAYS be the fixed string '1 3 5 7 9 11 13 15' — exactly 8 space-separated values. NEVER set this to match the number of input channels (e.g. '1 2' for 2 channels is WRONG). Scilab always expects exactly 8 color values regardless of channel count. Using any other value causes the error: Wrong size for block parameter 'Curve style: Color>0 | mark<0': 8 expected.
CRITICAL: integerParameters must ALWAYS have exactly width=15. Copy the 15 values verbatim from the xmlExample. Never change this array size.
description: C-based Scope for visualizing signal waveforms
anomalies: Has ControlPort (not ExplicitInput) - event-based display refresh
name: CSCOPE
